fault_hypothesis: The function incorrectly truncates the last byte from the concatenated result on line 80. The slice `[:-1]` should be removed, and the statement should simply be `return data`.

spec.expr: len(data__1[:-1]) == sum(len(p[1]) for p in chunk_list__2)

constraints.intent: The length of the data returned from this line must equal the sum of the lengths of all chunk parts.

spec.expr: all(chunk_list__2[i][0] <= chunk_list__2[i+1][0] for i in range(len(chunk_list__2) - 1))

constraints.intent: The chunk list must be sorted by index before the concatenation loop begins.
The data buffer should end with the most recently appended chunk part.

spec.expr: (not separator and chunks) implies (len(__cbfl_result) == sum(len(c[1]) for c in chunks))

constraints.intent: If no separator is used, the final payload length must equal the sum of all input chunk data lengths.
